description:
Configure Odoo's analytic accounting to track departmental costs by creating an analytic plan named 'Department Costs' with three associated analytic accounts: 'Engineering Dept', 'Marketing Dept', and 'Operations Dept'. Record and post a $12,000 vendor bill from 'Deco Addict' for 'IT Infrastructure Consulting - Q1', allocating the costs across the departments with 50% to Engineering Dept, 30% to Marketing Dept, and 20% to Operations Dept. 

Login credentials: admin@example.com / admin.
